description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the stages test, build, and deploy, uses the golang:latest Docker image for the jobs, and includes the docker:dind service. Set a REPO_NAME variable to gitlab.com/maksim.dadzerkin/go-build-example. In the test stage add a test-project job that runs on all branches except master, executes mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME, moves the project files, changes directory, runs go get -u github.com/golang/dep/cmd/dep, go get -u github.com/magefile/mage, go get -u github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint, then runs mage -v dep lint test. In the build stage add a build-and-release-project job that runs only on the master branch, performs the same setup steps, then runs mage -v dep lint test compile followed by go build -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/release/go-build-example, and publishes the resulting binary as an artifact at $CI_PROJECT_DIR/release/go-build-example. No caches are defined and no further deployment steps are configured.
